product_description: Height-adjustable standing desk with programmable memory positions, built-in wireless charging pad, and integrated cable management. Premium bamboo top with powder-coated steel frame.
target_audience: Remote workers and home-office professionals aged 25-45 who value productivity, ergonomics, and minimalist design

brand.visual_style: Clean Scandinavian interiors, warm natural light, minimalist composition

user_shot_list: Open on the desk in a dark room, sunrise light slowly flooding in through floor-to-ceiling windows
The desk silently rises from sitting to standing height, camera tracks upward with it, revealing a curated workspace
Wide shot of a person working at the desk, city skyline visible through windows, golden hour light
